# Transcrição: 8. Forget They Still Need to be Sold

- **Fonte:** 8. Forget They Still Need to be Sold
- **Duração:** 02:38
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 02:38]

You forgot they need to be sold. Look, remember it's going to take eight efforts just to get back in contact in many cases and then once you do, even get in front of them or on the web via computers, or you finally push things to maybe a phone call, you're still going to have to follow up. And before you start doing all this follow up, you have to do the selling. So if you're running an internet department or you run a home business with internet leads, you need to learn about selling. Selling can be done in person, it can be done in an email, it can be done over the phone, it can be done with texting, it can be done with letters, handwritten letters. I can sell anyone anywhere if I understand I'm selling, not just taking an order. Too many people on the internet think, oh, I'm going to run an ad, get a lead, I'm going to respond to it, everything's going to be fine. No, it's not going to be fine. It's just a big lead and a big information society and this huge universe of leads and opportunities and you're going to start freaking out thinking, oh, I can't sell these people. People still need to be sold. Even when you go to the grocery store, I need to be sold to pick up those extra products. If I'm not sure, I'm leaving it there. If I'm not certain, I'm leaving it there. If I'm uncertain, I'm not going to pull the trigger. How do I do that? I have to be sold. I have to be reassured. I have to be convinced this is the right decision at the right time that you'll support me. So how do you do that? How do you do that with emails? How do you do that with communicating with a lead? Look, you got to know about sales. Don't underestimate this idea that you sell. I hear so many people tell me, I run an internet business, it's home-based. We don't sell. That's the problem. You have to sell. Your consumer, if they were ready to purchase by themselves, would not have hit you for a lead. They would have made an order. They would have literally gone to your e-commerce box at the end and hit order and bought the product. If you were to sell the lead, this would be a customer. Remember, your customer has done their research. They're in a funnel or a pipeline. They've shown interest. At that moment, they could have shown interest in two or three other products or companies at the same time. It's like a first date, meeting with your in-laws. You still have to make a good impression. How do you make good impressions? Speed, information, variety of information, follow up, build trust, demonstrate transparency, add lots of information, build that relationship, even though I'm not touching you, not shaking your hand, not patting you on the back. I don't have those mechanisms. But think about how can you pat somebody on the back, shake their hand, build a relationship, create trust with the internet, with computers, with technology.
